fabric_care.drying: Dry in shade · Never tumble dry
fabric_care.ironing: Low heat · Use cloth between iron and fabric
fabric_care.storage: Wrap in muslin cloth · Not plastic · Re-fold every 6 months
fabric_care.special_notes: Avoid perfume/deodorant contact on zari · Wipe zari gently if tarnished

fabric_care.wash_method: Hand wash or gentle machine wash
fabric_care.storage: Fold flat · Store in cotton bag
fabric_care.special_notes: First wash colours may bleed slightly — wash alone

fabric_care.wash_method: Dry clean preferred · Hand wash gentle

fabric_care.ironing: Very low heat with pressing cloth
